    A

    AchievementTracker - Class in flashcard
    Tracks and checks achievements during a flashcard session.
    AchievementTracker() - Constructor for class flashcard.AchievementTracker
    Creates a new AchievementTracker.

    C

    CardFileParser - Class in flashcard
    Parses a flashcard file into a list of FlashCard objects.
    CardFileParser() - Constructor for class flashcard.CardFileParser
     
    CardOrganizer - Interface in flashcard
    Interface for organizing (sorting) flashcards.

    E

    endRound() - Method in class flashcard.AchievementTracker
    Called at the end of a round to check round-level achievements.

    F

    flashcard - package flashcard
     
    FlashCard - Class in flashcard
    Represents a single flashcard with a question and answer.
    FlashCard(String, String) - Constructor for class flashcard.FlashCard
    Creates a new FlashCard.
    FlashCardSession - Class in flashcard
    Runs an interactive flashcard study session.
    FlashCardSession(List, CardOrganizer, int, boolean) - Constructor for class flashcard.FlashCardSession
    Creates a new FlashCardSession.

    G

    getAnswer() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Returns the answer.
    getCorrectCount() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Returns the number of correct answers.
    getEarnedAchievements() - Method in class flashcard.AchievementTracker
    Returns the list of earned achievement names.
    getIncorrectCount() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Returns the number of incorrect answers.
    getQuestion() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Returns the question.
    getTotalAnswers() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Returns the total number of answers.

    I

    isMistakeInLastRound() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Returns whether this card had a mistake in the last round.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class flashcard.Main
    Main method.
    Main - Class in flashcard
    Main entry point for the Flashcard application.
    Main() - Constructor for class flashcard.Main
     

    O

    organize(List) - Method in interface flashcard.CardOrganizer
    Organizes the given list of flashcards and returns a new ordered list.
    organize(List) - Method in class flashcard.RandomSorter
    Returns cards in a randomly shuffled order.
    organize(List) - Method in class flashcard.RecentMistakesFirstSorter
    Returns cards where recent-mistake cards come first, preserving internal order within each group.
    organize(List) - Method in class flashcard.WorstFirstSorter
    Returns cards sorted by incorrect count descending (worst first).

    P

    parse(String) - Method in class flashcard.CardFileParser
    Parses the given file and returns a list of flashcards.

    R

    RandomSorter - Class in flashcard
    Organizes flashcards in a random order.
    RandomSorter() - Constructor for class flashcard.RandomSorter
     
    RecentMistakesFirstSorter - Class in flashcard
    Organizes flashcards so that cards with mistakes in the last round appear first.
    RecentMistakesFirstSorter() - Constructor for class flashcard.RecentMistakesFirstSorter
     
    recordAnswer(FlashCard, boolean, long) - Method in class flashcard.AchievementTracker
    Records the result and time for answering a card.
    recordCorrect() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Records a correct answer.
    recordIncorrect() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Records an incorrect answer.

    S

    setMistakeInLastRound(boolean) - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
    Sets the mistake-in-last-round flag.
    start(Scanner) - Method in class flashcard.FlashCardSession
    Starts the interactive session.
    startRound() - Method in class flashcard.AchievementTracker
    Called at the start of a new round to reset round-level tracking.

    T

    toString() - Method in class flashcard.FlashCard
     

    W

    WorstFirstSorter - Class in flashcard
    Organizes flashcards so that cards with the most incorrect answers appear first.
    WorstFirstSorter() - Constructor for class flashcard.WorstFirstSorter
